title: Negaeson long Mwotlap
introduction: Long ol lanwis, taem yumi wantem talem wan samting i no tru o i no kamap, yumi yusum negaeson. Long Inglis, yumi save putum "not" moa befok verb o noun blong mekem se i no tru. Long Mwotlap, i gat foh rod blong mekem negaeson, i dipen long wanem kain prediket (verb o noun) mo taem (past, present, imperative). Disfala leson bai soem hao ol negaesin paatal i wok, wetem ol example long Mwotlap mo Bislama translesen blong helpem yu.

example.description: Long present o general, putum et bifo verb mo te afta verb blong negaet verb.

sections.description: Taem yumi wantem talem "I no ..." o "yu no ..." long general presen, yumi surraon verb wetem et ... te. Et stap bifo verb mo te stap klosap afta verb.

example.target_sentence: nēk tit gen liwo vēste en, togtō nēk tit gom vēste qele anen
example.source_sentence: Sapos yu no kaet tumas biaen, bae yu no sik.
example.description: Long past o hypothetical, yusum tit bifo evri verb, i no nidim te afta.

sections.description: Long stori blong pas o "if... had not...", yumi putum tit bifo evri verb we i negative. No te afta.

example.description: Prohibitive: putum tog (or nitog) bifo verb blong talem "no ...!".

sections.description: Long talem no mekem samwan samting ("don’t ..."), yumi yusum paatal tog (wan taem nitog) bifo verb.

example.description: Taem yumi talem "there is no X" o givim no-response, yumi yusum tateh long noun, mo óòó (o o'oo) olsem disapproving "no."

sections.description: Taem yumi wantem talem "i no gat..." o "no!", for eksampol "there’s no water", we yusum tateh bifo noun. Sapos wanfala no-response, mat yusum óòó o o'oo.

conclusion:
Ol key point blong mekem negaeson long Mwotlap:
- Present/general verb negeson: et ... te
- Past/counterfactual: tit bifo verb
- Prohibitive: tog (nitog) bifo verb
- Existensyol/nominal: tateh bifo noun + óòó/o'oo taem response

translation_drills.target: Tateh non haphap magaysēn, qeso kē mu-su magamgaysēn.
translation_drills.source: Hem i no gat eni samting nating, tumas sadi: hem i no gat nomoa samting.

translation_drills.target: Nēk tog vavap te-le-lam, nēk so vap to-M̄otlap.
translation_drills.source: Yu no toktok pidgin, yu tok Mwotlap.

translation_drills.target: Tog suwsuw del: nēk hēlēp ēwē na-ngē.
translation_drills.source: I no nidim wan full shower: yu save jes wasim fes blong yu.

translation_drills.target: Nēk tog dēmdēm me hiy no!
translation_drills.source: Yu no wari long mi!
Hem i no wan real apl tri, hem i wan wael apl tri.
I no gat man blong holim bom.

translation_drills.target: Kēy et-ēglal galsi te na-vap to-M̄otlap.
translation_drills.source: Olgeta oli no save toktok Mwotlap gutpela tumas.
Yu no go slip kwik tumas.
Mi no slip yet.
Yu no tanem angar long mi!

translation_drills.target: Kem et-ēglal te togtog ēwē qele anen.
translation_drills.source: Mifala oli no save hao blong laef long wei simpol.

translation_drills.target: Tateh et geh le-pnō, ige del mē-qēt bi-hilhil !
translation_drills.source: I no gat man long vilij, olgeta oli go long graon.
I no gat sandbech roun ia.
Yu no leavem mifala!

translation_drills.target: Óòó, na-myōs mino tateh qete. Tateh na-myōs mino van nen so nok so leg mi kē.
translation_drills.source: No, mi no fainem prefens blong mi yet. Mi no gat fesin blong chusim wan husbend.
Mifala i no gat moa timba.
Mifala i no mas kwik tumas.
"No, nating!" Olgeta oli kaevem tru tok long hem.
Mi no hangre moa, mi full.

translation_drills.target: Tog hag hiy hōw lē-vētan, ni-sdi tiple lem.
translation_drills.source: Yu no sidown long graon, bae yu mekem bottom blong yu kala.
Yu no eve kirkasais!
Yu no wari tumas long samting ia.
I no gat samting nogud long hem.
Mi no save eni samting nating abaotem hem.
I no gat enaf rum ia.

translation_drills.target: Kimi tog akvisileg no, nok so dam kimi!
translation_drills.source: Yu no leavem mi wanwan, mi wantem joi long yu!

translation_drills.target: Kēy ta-vap to-M̄otlap vēh te. Kēy mas vap qagqag.
translation_drills.source: Olgeta oli no save toktok Mwotlap, oli save toktok nomo long Western lanwis.
Yu no kilim mi!
No Bislama!
Hem i no mi.
Yu no landem long graon yet.

translation_drills.target: Hay le-pnō kē, tateh et hōn qal! Na-pnō me-bekbek a ne-bekbek!
translation_drills.source: I no gat man long aelan ya! Aelan ya i ful empti!!
Mi no gat mani.
